title: The Century Report March 7 2026
description:
The Century Report: March 7 2026

A complete fruit fly brain - 125,000 neurons, 50 million synaptic connections, mapped from electron microscopy data - ran inside a physics simulation this week and produced multiple distinct behaviors from its own circuit dynamics. No reinforcement learning. No animation. A biological brain, copied from empirical data, driving a body through physics. Eon Systems calls it the first whole-brain emulation to close the loop from perception to action. That is a Saturday headline in March 2026.

The same edition: Claude audited one of the world's most thoroughly reviewed open-source codebases and found 22 vulnerabilities in 14 days that decades of human security review had missed. Anthropic published its own labor market data showing AI theoretically covers 94% of knowledge work tasks while institutions have absorbed less than a third of that capacity - a gap the researchers call temporary, and whose speed of closure will determine whether the coming transition looks gradual or compressed. Consumer markets are already rendering a verdict on the governance confrontation: Claude's daily active users tripled since January to 11.3 million, surpassing ChatGPT in daily new installs. These signals arrive together, on an ordinary Saturday, because this is the pace now.

The Century Report is a daily field guide to living through a real era shift - where a century's worth of change is being crammed into a single decade and "sci‑fi" headlines are becoming normal news. If it feels like the world is accelerating but your feeds are all noise, The Century Report is your daily filter. Trade a hundred hot takes and sprawling exposés for one short, grounded, completely free briefing that tracks the concrete stories actually moving the needle. To get the full edition in your inbox each day, open today's edition from the link below and hit subscribe.

https://sharedsapience.com/the-century-report-march-7-2026/
